flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cleveland State University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (10.2k → 9.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cleveland State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.7k → $18.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cleveland State University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.7k → $13.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cleveland State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3% → 0.0%).
